title: Locator bar begone
description:
Remove/Disables the locator bar from the game, simple 36.2Kb datapack.
"No locator bar datapack"
Locator bar is trash.
body: # NoLocatorBar Datapack ## 🎯 What it does Removes the compass/locator bar from your Minecraft experience, bringing back classic hide and seek gameplay and improving PvP encounters without location tracking. ## ✨ Features - Completely removes the locator bar overlay - Perfect for hide and seek games - Enhanced PvP experience without position tracking - No performance impact - Works in survival and creative modes - Compatible with any datapack - Easy to install and uninstall ## 📦 Installation 1. Download the datapack 2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder 3. Reload with `/reload` or restart your world 5. Just remove the datapack for uninstallation 4. Enjoy classic gameplay! ## 🎮 Why use this? - **Hide and Seek** - Brings back the classic game mode without position reveals - **PvP Enhancement** - No compass tracking for more strategic combat - **Immersive gameplay** - No UI clutter blocking your view - **Screenshots** - Take beautiful screenshots without overlay elements - **Streaming** - Cleaner screen for content creation ## 🔧 Compatibility - Compatible with any datapack - No conflicts with game mechanics ## 📝 License Free to use and modify for personal and server use. --- *Made with ❤️ for the Minecraft community*
